function.name: error_recoverer
function.description: Correct errors in previous tool calls by applying missing parameters or modifying tool content. Use when a tool call fails due to missing parameters or incorrect input. Automatically re-executes the corrected tool.

previous_tool_name.description: Name of the tool that failed

previous_tool_input.description: Original input parameters that were used

error_message.description: Error message from the failed tool execution

corrections.description: Corrections to apply to the tool call

action.description: Action to perform: fix missing parameters, modify tool content, or retry with fix

commonErrors.solution: Provide valid corrections that match the tool schema
